_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Internet and routing protocols.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.452), AI-K-004 (AI, cosine: 0.437).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.503). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, protocols]. DCWF-only terms [internet, routing] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.944, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.083 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of Internet and routing protocols." and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.596 > STS 0.503 (gap +0.093). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, protocols] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, protocols]. DCWF-only: [internet, routing]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].

signals.detail: STS 0.503 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
